textPlain: I was working on a custom runtime for minimal wasm apps recently. I didn't want to have to write all apps in C or Rust, so I went looking for tiny scripting languages. Lua is pretty small, but I wasn't able to get it to compile to wasm IIRC due to POSIX dependencies. This turned out to be quite easy with Wren[0].[0]: https://github.com/wren-lang/wren/issues/1199
